encounter.location: Triangle Pediatrics, 4201 Lake Boone Trail, Suite 200, Raleigh, NC 27607

medications.name: fluticasone/salmeterol (Advair HFA 115/21) 1 puff inhaled twice daily
medications.sig: 1 puff inhaled twice daily via spacer

medications.name: montelukast 4 mg chewable tablet
medications.sig: 4 mg chewable tablet by mouth once daily

medications.name: albuterol (ProAir HFA 90 mcg) 2 puffs inhaled as needed
medications.sig: 2 puffs inhaled every 4-6 hours as needed for wheezing or shortness of breath, via spacer

document_references.description: Documents one-week post-ED follow-up call with mother. Records completion of prednisolone burst, one week on stepped-up Advair 115/21 with significant improvement, no rescue inhaler use in 3 days, resolution of nighttime cough, return to school. Plan to continue current regimen without changes, confirmed upcoming UNC Allergy appointment in February, and encouraged symptom diary.
